name: Umicore
description: Umicore is focused on sustainability and recycling, particularly in the context of neodymium, which is known for its properties and applications. The company's commitment to providing materials of certified sustainable and ethical origin aligns with its broader strategy to lead in clean mobility materials and recycling efforts.

name: Yunsheng USA Inc.
description: Yunsheng is a leading manufacturer of rare earth permanent magnets, particularly specializing in Neodymium (NdFeB) products. They offer a wide range of high energy magnet grades and have a significant global presence, recognized as the largest provider of NdFeB materials and magnetic assemblies in the world.

name: Arnold Magnetic Technologies
description: Arnold Magnetic Technologies is a leading manufacturer of neodymium magnets (NdFeB), which are known for their high energy product and are utilized in various applications such as high-performance motors, magnetic resonance imaging, and sensors. Their commitment to quality and innovation ensures a comprehensive range of neodymium magnet products.

name: CBMM
description: CBMM specializes in niobium products and applications, emphasizing innovative technologies that promote sustainability and efficiency. Their commitment to research and development ensures high-quality niobium metal products, which may be relevant for applications involving advanced materials like neodymium.

name: Eclipse Magnetics
description: Eclipse Magnetics provides high-strength neodymium magnets, known for their superior magnetic performance. Their offerings include a range of neodymium magnet materials, highlighting the company's expertise in this area.

name: Rare Earth Elements LLC
description: Polaris Rare Earth Materials, LLC is a global manufacturer of rare earth materials, including neodymium, which is essential for various high-tech applications in sectors like automotive and consumer electronics. The company's commitment to quality control and environmental responsibility underscores its dedication to providing reliable and sustainable rare earth products.

name: Hangzhou Zhijiang Magnetics Co., Ltd
description: The company specializes in the production of rare earth permanent magnets, including Neodymium (NdFeB), and has established itself as a leading manufacturer in China. Their diverse product range and commitment to high-performance materials position them well in both domestic and international markets.

name: Goudsmit Magnetics
description: Goudsmit Magnetics specializes in the development and production of permanent neodymium (NdFeB) magnets, offering customer-specific solutions tailored to various applications. Their expertise includes providing insights into metal separation and conducting 3D magnet calculations and simulations, ensuring optimal magnet performance.

name: Dexter Magnetic Technologies
description: Dexter Magnetic Technologies specializes in sintered neodymium-iron-boron (Nd-Fe-B) magnets, offering a resource page that includes detailed information on grades and properties. Their focus on quality and innovative design supports customers in their magnetic needs.

name: REEtec
description: REEtec has developed an innovative process for manufacturing high-quality rare earth elements (REE), including neodymium. The company's commitment to establishing an industrial Rare Earth separation plant in Norway highlights its focus on producing essential materials like neodymium.
